subcodes.first_line: Thy letter hath reached Our presence and We have perused it [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد حضر بین یدینا کتابک و اطلعنا
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for protection, @prayer for nearness to God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
